appliedUpdates.description: Documented that the refreshed runtime token bridge alone now authenticates validator sessions for auth-required dashboard and empty-pipeline reruns, without the earlier marker-state dependency.

notes: Round 5 closed all remaining frontend-decomposition reruns. Runtime token-bridge auth now enables real Google-backed drawer saves and empty-fixture access, the empty pipeline fixture id 1zK-I18WITjwcqsx4LgVSFk-dmAot2dxHae1Y0N9CPB0 renders the expected guided empty states, and the remaining draft/profile cross-surface assertions all passed with live browser evidence.
